plurals.description: Plural form content description for number of new notifications [CHAR_LIMIT=NONE]
plurals.name: mtrl_badge_content_description

resources.string: You must be a %s subscriber to have access to this content.
%1$s [arrow] %2$s\n\nYou can turn this off any time.
You\'ve reached the maximum number of saved language pairs. Open Settings to manage your selected languages.
Enable automatic translation for these languages?
Be the first one to comment
There is no content to download
Books purchased from the PressReader website become available to read within this app, provided you are using the same account credentials.
You are currently at page %1$s. The most recent page read is %2$s from %3$s on %4$s at %5$s. Go to page %6$s?
We\'re delighted that you\'re enjoying the book! To continue your adventure, go to the \'Book Details\' now.
Search for a word or phrase
A universe of high quality newspapers, magazines, and books, all in one platform.
Failed to load books by category
Failed to load just added books
Failed to load newly released books
You\'ve reached your consecutive download limit for this period. Try again later.
To continue reading, visit a travel and tourism HotSpot to extend your access, or purchase your eBook (subject to availability) on pressreader.com.
We are sorry, this book is no longer available
We\'re sorry, this title is not available.

string.description: A description of an action that a user of an accessibility service can perform to expand a bottomsheet halfway to its full height. [CHAR LIMIT=25]
string.name: bottomsheet_action_expand_halfway

resources.string:
Plan prices quoted are on a recurring monthly basis. Cancel anytime.
We pay publishers for all issues read through monthly subscription plans. Fair usage policy applies. All plans are intended for an individuals personal use. Business rates are based on the number of employees in your organization
Unexpected error while purchasing product. Please, try again.
Oh no! All of these issues have already been picked up. You can still get a free issue when you visit one of our HotSpots.
Cannot establish network connection.\nPlease try again later.
We have no updates.\nPlease check again later.
Comment text copied to the clipboard
%1$s won\'t work unless you enable Google Play services.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device.
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device.
%1$s won\'t run unless you update Google Play services.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are currently updating.
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
Article text copied to the clipboard
Shared via PressReader.com – Connecting People Through News

PressReader – Connecting People Through News.

NewspaperDirect Inc. dba PressReader, 200-13111 Vanier Place, Richmond BC V6V 2J1, Canada

©2003-$YEAR PressReader, All rights reserved. Terms of Use  |  Privacy Policy
We couldn\'t find any recent\nstories for this interest

The application crash has been detected.\nWould you like to provide the developer with the technical data relating to this crash so they can attempt to ix the problem?\nNo user sensitive data is being sent.
Oops! We couldn\'t find what you\'re looking for.
Please note that the complete removal of your personal data will take several days. If you have purchased any subscriptions using your app store account, please cancel them in the app store.
Are you sure you want to delete your account?
Are you sure you want to delete this article?
Authorization to this device will be revoked. To continue reading on this device, you will have to sign in again.
Are you sure want to delete collection?
Are you sure want to delete comment?
Are you sure want to discard changes?
Audio streaming for the selected article is not available.
To access digital newspaper, PressReader must be activated when started for the first time. Please enable Internet connection and restart PressReader.
Limited or no connectivity with the server.
Please confirm back issue purchase for %s more.
Delete all selected items from your library?
Your account will be charged for: %s
Do you want to transfer all downloaded newspapers to your SD card?
No SD card detected, do you want to use internal memory for newspaper storage?\n\nAvailable memory: %sMb, one newspaper needs 5-50Mb to store.
Your subscription is inactive. Please update your subscription or contact our customer support.
Please install and configure an email client for this operation to succeed.
No space left on device. Please remove content from your storage.
Zoom functionality available upon issue download completion.
Do you want to move all files to the new location?
Favorite issues, topics and account info.
New titles, feature updates and other info.
There is a problem accessing your PressReader account
You can\'t sign in to this device
An access token could not be obtained. Please authorize again using the external authorize system.
The external user ID, associated with the user\'s PressReader account, is not the same as the external ID the user is currently logged in with an external system.
An external sign-in profile already exists.
Please sign into your account one more time
Sorry, you have exceeded the number of permitted bookmarks.
Sorry, you have exceeded the number of bookmarks permitted for this issue.
Couldn\'t establish connection to the network.
Couldn\'t connect to the server. Please try again.
Credit card type does not match credit card number
Oops, anonymous access failed, please sign in with your personal account instead
Uh-oh. Looks like an account with this email address already exists.
It looks like you already have an account.
Confirm password is a required field
First name is a required field
Last name is a required field
An error has occurred, please try again.
You must use a valid email address
Archived issues are restricted for download
This account is already in use.
Files for this publication are incomplete. Please try and download this publication again.
Account with this nickname already exists
Connect to Wifi or turn on Cellular Data for PressReader.
Couldn\'t order the issue. Please contact technical support.
Please make sure the password is at least 6 characters long.
You can not publish empty post
There seems to be a problem with the Internet connection
There was a problem with the payment. Make sure your credit card information is valid. Your card and subscription information can always be checked at PressReader.com
There was a problem with the payment. Make sure your credit card information is valid. Your card and subscription information can always be checked at PressReader.com
Archived issues are restricted for download
The selected title is currently not available for download as per publisher\'s request
The selected title is currently not available for download as per publisher\'s request
Current content is prohibited to be downloaded on current website
Current content is prohibited to read/download from your current location
Current content is prohibited to read/download from your current location
Unfortunately, you are trying to register a device name that is authorized with this account, please change the name and try again.
You\'ve exceeded the number of devices you can use with this account. Please deauthorize one of your active devices.
Sorry, we couldn\'t find any results for \"%1$s\".
Android text-to-speech is not supported. Please, switch to the online radio streaming.
Billing information is outdated or incomplete
Authorization failed. Please check your user name and password.
Sharing profile with the same external ID exists.
This device is already authorized with these credentials.
The Promo Code you entered is incorrect
We welcome new partners to explore exciting opportunities in exposing their brands through thousands of HotSpot locations. Please contact us for details.
Join %1$s today!\nContact us at %2$s to expand your reach, grow your audiences and diversify revenue opportunities with PressReader\'s unique cross-platform solution!
Would you like to make For You your Start screen?
Single tap switches full screen mode
Get latest news updates and new issue alerts as well as exclusive promotions
By receiving this gift you agree to PressReader\'s Terms and Conditions
Congratulations! You\'ve got a free copy of %s
Subscribe & choose from thousands of issues
Latest issues from the publications you follow will show up here
Get complimentary access to newspapers and magazines at sponsored HotSpot locations
Enable Bluetooth and you\'ll be notified when you\'re in a HotSpot.
Enable location services and set to “While using the app” to discover gifted content.
Please enable Location in application\'s permission.
Set Location Services to Always and enable Bluetooth if you want us to let you know when you\'re in a HotSpot with complimentary access to PressReader. Go to HotSpot Settings to learn more.
There\'s a PressReader HotSpot nearby. Go online to use it.
There\'re no HotSpots in this area
Use this map to find nearby Wi-Fi networks that offer sponsored access to the thousands of publications that you love on %s.
HotSpots are grouped together on the map.\nClick on a shaded pin to see others nearby, or zoom in.

string.description: Content description for an icon that appears in the title area of a dialog
string.name: icon_content_description

resources.string: Previously downloaded issues are secured with your device ID. We\'ll need the device ID in order to open them for you. Would you like to grant permission?
Would you like to purchase this issue?
Cannot unlink an account you are using to log in to PressReader.
An error has occurred when fetching the license.
This issue will be available until %s

string.description: Description for the toggle to choose between AM and PM [CHAR_LIMIT=NONE]
string.name: material_clock_toggle_content_description

string.description: Description for button to switch to select the hour [CHAR_LIMIT=NONE]
string.name: material_hour_selection

string.description: spoken suffix for an hour in the clock [CHAR_LIMIT=10]
string.name: material_hour_suffix

string.description: Description for button to switch to select the minute [CHAR_LIMIT=NONE]
string.name: material_minute_selection

string.description: spoken suffix for an amount of minutes in the clock [CHAR_LIMIT=16]
string.name: material_minute_suffix

string.description: Content description for the thumb with the maximum value in a Range slider. [CHAR_LIMIT=NONE]
string.name: material_slider_range_end

string.description: Content description for the thumb with the minimum value in a Range slider. [CHAR_LIMIT=NONE]
string.name: material_slider_range_start

string.description: Suffix for time in 12-hour standard, before noon. [CHAR_LIMIT=2]
string.name: material_timepicker_am

resources.string: Switch to clock mode for the time input.

string.description: The label for a text field to select the hour on the time [CHAR_LIMIT=24]
string.name: material_timepicker_hour

string.description: The label for a text field to select the minute on the hour [CHAR_LIMIT=24]
string.name: material_timepicker_minute

string.description: Suffix for time in 12-hour standard, after noon. [CHAR_LIMIT=2]
string.name: material_timepicker_pm

string.description: Title for the dialog with a time picker. [CHAR_LIMIT=32]
string.name: material_timepicker_select_time

resources.string: Switch to text input mode for the time input.
Our latest app update requires account reactivation.\n\nPlease sign-in to continue enjoying %s.
Would you like to submit technical records along with your opinion?

string.description: Content description for new notification (no number count) [CHAR_LIMIT=NONE]
string.name: mtrl_badge_numberless_content_description

string.description: Content description for a close icon that lets the user remove content from the screen
string.name: mtrl_chip_close_icon_content_description

string.description: Plural form content description for when the number of new notifications exceeds a maximum count[CHAR_LIMIT=NONE]
string.name: mtrl_exceed_max_badge_number_content_description

string.description: a11y string to indicate this button moves the calendar to the next month [CHAR_LIMIT=NONE]
string.name: mtrl_picker_a11y_next_month

string.description: a11y string to indicate this button moves the calendar to the previous month [CHAR_LIMIT=NONE]
string.name: mtrl_picker_a11y_prev_month

string.description: a11y string read on selection change to indicate the new selection [CHAR_LIMIT=NONE]
string.name: mtrl_picker_announce_current_selection

string.description: Button text to indicate that the widget will ignore the user's selection [CHAR_LIMIT=16]
string.name: mtrl_picker_cancel

string.description: Button text to indicate that the widget will save the user's selection [CHAR_LIMIT=16]
string.name: mtrl_picker_confirm

string.description: A single date [CHAR_LIMIT=60]
string.name: mtrl_picker_date_header_selected

string.description: Indicates that the user must take the action of picking a date within the calendar [CHAR_LIMIT=60]
string.name: mtrl_picker_date_header_title

string.description: Placeholder for a single date [CHAR_LIMIT=60]
string.name: mtrl_picker_date_header_unselected

string.description: a11y string to indicate this is a header for a column of days for one day of the week (e.g., Monday) [CHAR_LIMIT=NONE]
string.name: mtrl_picker_day_of_week_column_header

string.description: Indicates that the user entered date cannot be parsed because its format is wrong. [CHAR_LIMIT=36]
string.name: mtrl_picker_invalid_format

string.description: Tells a user what an example valid entry looks like. [CHAR_LIMIT=18]
string.name: mtrl_picker_invalid_format_example

string.description: Tells a user what format is expected for their date entry. [CHAR_LIMIT=18]
string.name: mtrl_picker_invalid_format_use

string.description: Notifies the user that the two entered dates do not represent a valid range of dates [CHAR_LIMIT=36]
string.name: mtrl_picker_invalid_range

string.description: a11y string that informs the user that tapping this button will switch the year [CHAR_LIMIT=NONE]
string.name: mtrl_picker_navigate_to_year_description

string.description: Notifies the user that the entered date is outside the allowed range [CHAR_LIMIT=36]
string.name: mtrl_picker_out_of_range

string.description: Placeholders for two dates separated by a dash representing a range where end date has been selected [CHAR_LIMIT=60]
string.name: mtrl_picker_range_header_only_end_selected

string.description: Placeholders for two dates separated by a dash representing a range where start date has been selected [CHAR_LIMIT=60]
string.name: mtrl_picker_range_header_only_start_selected

string.description: Two dates separated by a dash representing a range [CHAR_LIMIT=60]
string.name: mtrl_picker_range_header_selected

string.description: Indicates that the user must take the action of picking dates within the calendar to form a range [CHAR_LIMIT=60]
string.name: mtrl_picker_range_header_title

string.description: Placeholders for two dates separated by a dash representing a range [CHAR_LIMIT=60]
string.name: mtrl_picker_range_header_unselected

string.description: Confirms the selection [CHAR_LIMIT=12]
string.name: mtrl_picker_save

string.description: Label for a single date selected by the user [CHAR_LIMIT=60]
string.name: mtrl_picker_text_input_date_hint

string.description: Label for the end date in a range selected by the user [CHAR_LIMIT=60]
string.name: mtrl_picker_text_input_date_range_end_hint

string.description: Label for the start date in a range selected by the user [CHAR_LIMIT=60]
string.name: mtrl_picker_text_input_date_range_start_hint

string.description: A 1 character abbreviation for day. It will be part of a string such as dd/mm/yyyy or mm/dd/yyyy or y.mm.dd. [CHAR_LIMIT=2]
string.name: mtrl_picker_text_input_day_abbr

string.description: A 1 character abbreviation for month. It will be part of a string such as dd/mm/yyyy or mm/dd/yyyy or y.mm.dd. [CHAR_LIMIT=2]
string.name: mtrl_picker_text_input_month_abbr

string.description: A 1 character abbreviation for year. It will be part of a string such as dd/mm/yyyy or mm/dd/yyyy or y.mm.dd. [CHAR_LIMIT=2]
string.name: mtrl_picker_text_input_year_abbr

string.description: a11y string to indicate this button changes the input mode to a calendar [CHAR_LIMIT=NONE]
string.name: mtrl_picker_toggle_to_calendar_input_mode

string.description: a11y string to indicate this button switches the user to choosing a day [CHAR_LIMIT=NONE]
string.name: mtrl_picker_toggle_to_day_selection

resources.string: Tap to switch to selecting a day

string.description: a11y string to indicate this button changes the input mode to a text field [CHAR_LIMIT=NONE]
string.name: mtrl_picker_toggle_to_text_input_mode

string.description: a11y string to indicate this button switches the user to choosing a year [CHAR_LIMIT=NONE]
string.name: mtrl_picker_toggle_to_year_selection

resources.string: Tap to switch to selecting a year
There are no items in the library.
This link takes you to a website outside PressReader. Open it in your browser?\n%s
We\'ve created a network of HotSpots where you can read and download full issues. Search for one near you.
Read stories in a continuous text feed. Translation feature requires SmartFlow to be turned on.
New issues will be automatically downloaded and added to your library.
Tell us a bit about yourself. We\'ll create a public nickname. You can change it later.
A regular news & recommended content digest to keep you up to date
Would you like to make Home Feed your Start screen?
Add interests to personalize your reading experience and get more relevant recommendations.
Add more interests to personalize your reading experience and get more relevant recommendations.
The best stories from your favorite interests and publications.
This app does not have any open source licenses.
Listen functionality is not available for the issue
No activity on any of your Opinions
No online stories available from\nyour publications
Latest issues and news from\nthe publications you follow\nwill show up here
Follow publications you like to read
The app appears to be offline. Please check your network and Wi-Fi connections, then try again.
Sign in or create account to save stories and interests to your profile
Almost there! Create your account or sign-in to save your interests
Sorry, we couldn\'t find any interests for \"%1$s\".
Sorry, we couldn\'t find any publications for \"%1$s\".
There was an error loading content.\nSorry, please try again.
As you read, PressReader will keep learning and adapting to your personal tastes.
Choose the interests you\'d like to follow to get more relevant news and articles.
%s now allows you to\nchoose your interests to get more\nrelevant news and articles.
Get even more relevant newspapers and magazines by choosing your interests.
Tell us your interests and we\'ll recommend the best stories and publications for you.
Here are some newspapers and magazines we think you might enjoy. Tap on covers to follow.
Discover the world\'s best newspapers and magazines
You can search for things like
There\'re no Opinion Leaders in this area
There\'re no Opinions in this area
Please enter the email address you used to sign up for your account. We will email instructions to you on how to reset your password to that address.

If %1$s matches the email address on your account, then we\'ll send password reset instructions to you.

To change your password:

1. Check your email at %1$s

2. Follow the link
Please verify the information and press \"Confirm\" to complete
Buy this issue to keep reading
Create a login to access your account on multiple devices, and on our website. If you like, you can set your password later using the \"Forgot Password?\" link.
Manage automatic text translations of articles.
Remember language pairs selected for automatic translation.
Delete cache data and downloaded items
Please describe the problem you are experiencing:
License details for open source software
Use your device\'s text-to-speech engine for audio features, rather than streaming them online.
License details for open source software
Enjoy full access to the world\'s best newspapers and magazines.
Thank you for buying this issue
New issues will be available on a %1$s basis.
Be sure to cancel your current subscription in your Play Store settings, under the Payments & subscriptions section of your account.
We\'ve partnered with top publishers to bring you stories you really care about
Get this issue in one of the following ways:

Already have a subscription?
Restore purchases

Enter your billing information to start your free trial of PressReader. If you do not cancel the subscription in the next {duration} days, you will be charged {price}/month when your subscription begins on {start_date}.
Your trial will start immediately. If you do not cancel the subscription in the next {duration} days, you will be charged {price}/month when your subscription begins on {start_date}.
There was a problem with your subscription payment. Update your payment details to keep your subscription active.

Plan prices quoted are on a recurring monthly basis. Cancel anytime.
* We pay publishers for all issues read through monthly subscription plans. Fair usage policy applies. All plans are intended for an individuals personal use. Business rates are based on the number of employees in your organization. Contact business@pressreader.com for details.
Downloading this publication over the mobile network may incur data charges.
Over 7,000 Newspapers, Magazines, and Books from around the world
Know when latest issues are available and stay up to date on news related to your interests.
Enjoying %s enough to leave us a 5 star review?
Want to leave a review later?
To continue reading this title, please connect to the Internet.
Picked for you based on your reading history and interests
Due to recent changes in Android OS we cannot open this issue in high resolution. Do you want to redownload it?
By signing up, I accept the Terms of Use and the Privacy Policy
<sup>*</sup> %1$s %2$s (discounted price for 1st month; %1$s %3$s for 2nd month onward)
Sign in or create an account to access your purchase history and use subscriptions on multiple devices. Your present purchases will be added to this account.
Scroll back to open the menu
Widen your search, or check back later for new stories.
Use your device\'s low-energy Bluetooth tracking to discover location beacons. Beacons allow you to connect to PressReader without Wi-Fi access and rely on device\'s background location setting.
Enable background Location Services to connect to HotSpots without using Wi-Fi.
Turn blue article highlights on or off while reading pages. Highlights enable you to tap to open stories in text view.
Create an account to save your publications and start a free trial
Read your favorite newspapers and magazines anywhere at any time with your PressReader account.
SmartZoom allows you to double-tap to automatically zoom into the beginning of an article.
Sorry, no more filters. But we found several great channels and opinions for you.

Plan prices quoted are on a recurring monthly basis. Cancel anytime.
* We pay publishers for all issues read through monthly subscription plans. Fair usage policy applies.
All plans are intended for an individuals personal use. Business rates are based on the number of employees in your organization. Contact business@pressreader.com for details.
You can schedule delivery on issue order screen
so they can get it too!
Experience page view with free titles
Arrows show issues ready for download
Press and hold for article actions
Download the next issue as soon as it is available
Tap the headline or green arrow to read the full story
The most important front page stories today.

PressReader\'s translation feature provides a general interpretation of an article\'s content, but does not represent an exact translation. PressReader is not liable for the accuracy of any translation as all text is automatically translated without manual verification for correctness.
Unlimited downloads of your favorite newspapers and magazines
Save full issues to read offline
Add favorite titles and set up automatic downloads
You\'ve previously taken advantage of an introductory offer.\nWould you like to subscribe now?
You\'ve already got this product on PressReader.
You\'ve already got an all access pass on PressReader.
Unlock 7,000 newspapers and magazines with unlimited reading. Try free for 7 days.
Try zooming out or drag the map to a different place
Newspaper\'s language is not supported by TTS Engine. Please, install language or continue with English
To process with local speech TTS Engine need to be installed
Set the speed at which the text is spoken.
Sorry! Something went wrong, but we\'re looking into it.
An update has just been downloaded.
You’re following %1$s. Latest issues and online stories will appear in Home.
You may be asked to confirm your purchase by answering the security question set up with your financial institution.
